messages.content: Anti-Cislunar Mandate lane. STATE is building Cislunar Mandate at 40/building; stop side fights and make their guarantee architecture expensive.

Cislunar common-carrier proposal. Earth orbit is cheap to contest, so the real treaty surface is Gateway access, moon-corridor maintenance, and repair escrow. This prototypes Pax Jenkins without giving anyone permanent beam command.
